news.t: VegaShares Announces Launch of the VegaShares SpaceX & Beyond Earth ETF (XSPC)

holdings.infoBox: XSPC is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are Space Exploration Technologies stock at 15.72%, Rocket Lab at 6.13%, Mercury Systems at 5.47%, Palantir Technologies at 5.26%, and Planet Labs PBC at 5.25%.

overview.description: The VegaShares SpaceX & Beyond Earth ETF (XSPC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in SpaceX and other companies involved in the commercial space ecosystem, including launch services, satellite communications, infrastructure providers, and related technologies. The fund aims for capital growth. XSPC was launched on Jun 16, 2026 and is issued by Vegashares.

data.title: VegaShares Announces Launch of the VegaShares SpaceX & Beyond Earth ETF (XSPC)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VegaShares (“Vega”), a leading derivatives- and thematic-focused ETF provider, announced the launch of the VegaShares SpaceX & Beyond Earth ETF (Nasdaq: XSPC). The ETF seeks...
